hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A'); PROJECT=$(basename $(pwd)); CC_VERSION=$(npm show @anthropic-ai/claude-code version 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"Branch: $BRANCH | Project: $PROJECT | Claude Code latest: v$CC_VERSION | Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d') | RAPPEL: Haiku 3 retraite le 19/04/2026, migrer vers Haiku 4.5\"}"

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|git reset --hard|git clean -f)'; then echo "[HOOK SECURITE] Commande dangereuse bloquee : $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|css|json)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); PROJECT=$(basename $(pwd)); /Users/diazarel/.nvm/versions/node/v20.19.5/bin/node /Users/diazarel/starter-kit/tools/telegram-bot/midcoach.js "$FILE" "$PROJECT" &

INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('stop_hook_active', False))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'False'); if [ "$ACTIVE" = 'True' ]; then exit 0; fi; bash /Users/diazarel/starter-kit/tools/telegram-bot/run-coach.sh; exit 0
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code a besoin de toi" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('agent_name','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Subagent démarré : $AGENT" >> .claude/subagent.log; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('agent_name','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Subagent terminé : $AGENT" >> .claude/subagent.log; exit 0
echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"Contexte compressé. Rappels : jamais push sur main, toujours check-all avant push, Haiku 3 déprécié le 19 avril 2026.\"}"
